message:
feat(search): implement hybrid search with Tantivy and hash embeddings

Add the search infrastructure implementing hybrid search that combines
BM25 lexical search with semantic similarity using hash embeddings and
Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF) for result merging.

src/search/mod.rs:
- SearchIndex struct encapsulating index management
- Module organization and public re-exports
- Index initialization and lifecycle management

src/search/tantivy.rs:
- Tantivy schema definition for skill documents
- Field configuration: title, content, tags, metadata
- Index writer and reader management

src/search/tantivy_index.rs:
- TantivyIndex implementation with full lifecycle
- Document indexing with field extraction
- Query parsing and execution
- BM25 scoring with configurable parameters

src/search/embeddings.rs:
- HashEmbedder struct for ML-free semantic similarity
- FNV-1a based hash function (deterministic, fast)
- Configurable dimension size (default 384)
- Cosine similarity calculation between vectors

src/search/embeddings_local.rs:
- Local embedding generation utilities
- Batch processing for efficiency

src/search/hybrid.rs:
- HybridSearch combining BM25 + embedding similarity
- Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF) for score merging
- Configurable weights (bm25_weight, embedding_weight)
- K parameter tuning for RRF (default k=60)

src/search/context.rs:
- ContextProvider for context-aware search
- Working directory analysis for relevance boosting
- Project-specific search customization

Design follows /data/projects/xf architecture:
- No ML dependencies (hash embeddings only)
- Sub-millisecond query performance
- Incremental indexing support
- Memory-efficient operation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
